CommunityApplications.Profile:
**Bifrost** — a self-hosted smart home control hub.
Bifrost brings your lights (Philips Hue, Govee, LIFX), audio (Sonos, Onkyo / Integra), power devices (switches, plugs, fans), and TVs/streamers under one web UI and REST API, and can also surface any Home Assistant integration as a Bifrost device. Organize devices into rooms, save scenes (full-state snapshots you can restore in one tap), and control everything by voice or AI assistants through the embedded MCP server. It aims to keep device connections live and show each device's real state, and ships as a single binary with one SQLite file.
This repository hosts the Unraid Community Applications template for Bifrost. Install it from the **Apps** tab, set a `BIFROST_SECRET`, and open the web UI on port 3000.
Source & issues: https://github.com/others-git/bifrost
